key_risks: HIGH: SSRF: Request URL controlled by external input (S9)
HIGH: Unexpected capability for git skill: credential_read (M1)

findings.title: Reads environment variable: POSTIZ_API_KEY
findings.description: Code reads environment variable via os.getenv()
findings.remediation: Ensure this variable is used only for its intended purpose.

findings.title: Reads environment variable: POSTIZ_API_URL
findings.description: Code reads environment variable via os.getenv()

findings.title: SSRF: Request URL controlled by external input
findings.description: Network request URL comes from external source (os.getenv())
findings.remediation: Validate and allowlist URLs before making requests.

findings.title: Unsafe deserialization via p.open()
findings.description: Code uses p.open() which can execute arbitrary code during deserialization
findings.remediation: Replace pickle with JSON or MessagePack. Use yaml.safe_load() instead of yaml.load().

findings.title: SSRF: Request URL controlled by external input
findings.description: Network request URL comes from external source (os.getenv())
findings.remediation: Validate and allowlist URLs before making requests.

findings.title: Outbound network request
findings.description: Code makes outbound network request via r.get()
findings.remediation: Verify the request target is expected and trusted.

findings.title: Unexpected capability for git skill: credential_read
findings.description: A 'git' skill would not normally require 'credential_read' capability. Allowed capabilities for this category: file_read, file_write, shell_git
findings.remediation: Review why a git skill needs credential_read access.
